## Scenario

Describe the table setup, player intent, and important prior state without
including private or sensitive game text.

## Classification

- [ ] Narration quality or tone
- [ ] Rules/roll handling
- [ ] State, inventory, combat, or checkpoint application
- [ ] Canon/continuity or active NPC/location context
- [ ] Clarification, turn control, or multiplayer delivery
- [ ] Provider/helper/compiler behavior

## Sanitized evidence

- Bad-turn/feedback report reference:
- Session Quality/support-bundle reference:
- Relevant event, state diff, or log timestamp:

## Regression target

- [ ] Deterministic scenario fixture
- [ ] Turn/state/event assertion
- [ ] Provider/model recorded
- [ ] Fixed-input helper/compiler comparison when relevant
- [ ] Expected behavior documented without redefining product requirements
